title: No Creakings
body:
**Mod Name**: **No Creakings**  
**Version**: 1.21.4  
**Purpose**: Disable Creaking Mob Spawning  
**Author**: [Raccoonism](https://modrinth.com/user/Raccoonism)  
**Release Date**: 05/12/2024  

### ✅ What It Does  
**No Creakings** stops the creaking mob from spawning, so you won’t have to deal with any unexpected jumpscares.

### Why You Should Download It  
- **No Jumpscares**: Avoid being scared by the creaking.  
- **More Peaceful Gameplay**: Enjoy a more peaceful experience without having to set the difficulty to peaceful.

### Compatibility  
The mod works server-side, so players don’t need it to join your world. You can install it client-side for singleplayer use.

### Critical Information  
Requires Minecraft 1.21.4 or above.  
Feel free to include this mod in any modpacks, no credit required :)
